scope: DM1/V1 entrance frontend waits for input before switch sound, fixed 20-tick pre-open delay, and door-open handoff evidence.

sourceRanges.assertion: Draw entrance, show pointer, discard all stale input, set C099_MODE_WAITING_ON_ENTRANCE, wait at least one VBlank per poll, process queued commands, and redraw credits until a non-credits command exits the loop.
After a command exits the wait loop, source plays switch sound, delays F0022_MAIN_Delay(20), hides pointer, then opens doors when G0298_B_NewGame is nonzero.
Entrance keyboard table maps Enter to C200_COMMAND_ENTRANCE_ENTER_DUNGEON and keeps the quit sibling route; I34E/I34M/P31J Enter scancode is 0x001C.
Firestaff source-event evidence explicitly cites the ReDMCSB wait, switch-sound, delay, and door-open ranges.
Firestaff sequence preserves wait as step 4, switch sound as step 5, 20-tick delay as step 6, and door steps as 7..37.
Summary evidence names the VBlank/input wait, F0022_MAIN_Delay(20), and F0438 door-open handoff.
Firestaff keyboard evidence names COMMAND.C:551-577, C200 enter-dungeon, and C216 quit routes.

nonClaims: Does not claim runtime pixel parity for entrance art, palettes, or screenshots; this is a source/evidence gate only.
Does not replace a future live input queue timing probe; it locks the source ordering and Firestaff evidence contract for the entrance handoff.
Does not use DANNESBURK; source paths are ReDMCSB and Firestaff N2-local only.
